note: Owner-verified events only. Schema: title, start (YYYY-MM-DD or ISO datetime), end (optional), location, url, description, category.

events.title: Exhibit: Retrospect
events.location: Grace Gallery, San Lorenzo Valley Museum, 12547 Hwy 9, Boulder Creek
events.description: Ongoing exhibit looking back at the first 50 years of the San Lorenzo Valley Historical Society, on view through late 2026 during gallery hours, Wednesday to Sunday 1 to 4 pm.

events.title: Exhibit: The Road I Call Home
events.location: Belardi Gallery, San Lorenzo Valley Museum, 6299 Gushee St, Felton
events.description: Ongoing photography exhibit by Randy Bacon on the lives of people experiencing homelessness, on view through September 20 during gallery hours, Thursday, Saturday and Sunday 1 to 4 pm.

events.title: Boulder Creek Book Group
events.location: Boulder Creek Branch Library, Boulder Creek
events.description: Monthly library book group meeting in person and via Zoom, 11 am to noon.

events.title: Boulder Creek Farmers Market
events.location: Junction Park, Middleton Avenue at Railroad Avenue, Boulder Creek
events.description: Weekly market at Junction Park with local vendors, farms, music, and activities, every Thursday from 1:30 to 6:30 p.m. Only certified service dogs are allowed at Junction Park during the market, per the Santa Cruz County Health Department.

events.title: Volunteer Fuel Reduction Workday at Big Basin
events.location: Big Basin Redwoods State Park, Boulder Creek
events.description: Hands-on volunteer workday with Sempervirens Fund helping with fuel reduction in Big Basin Redwoods State Park; registration details on the Sempervirens events page.

events.title: Discovery Zone Playgroup
events.location: Boulder Creek Branch Library, Boulder Creek
events.description: Drop-in playgroup for young children and caregivers at the library, 11 am to noon.

events.title: Free Food Fridays
events.location: Open lot next to Jenna Sue's Cafe, downtown Boulder Creek (Junction Park if raining)
events.description: Weekly free food distribution run by BCRPD volunteers with the Grey Bears Healthy Food program, every Friday at 3 pm until items are gone, open to everyone with no signup needed.

events.title: Flick and Soak Community Night
events.location: Bear Creek Pool, 15685 Forest Hill Dr, Boulder Creek
events.description: Community night at Bear Creek Pool with the pool open 12:30 to 8 pm, crafts and games 4 to 8 pm, and a movie from 6:30 to 8 pm.

events.title: Medicine Road
events.location: Joe's Bar, 13118 Highway 9, Boulder Creek
events.description: Psychedelic, country, rock, and folk from a band formed in Boulder Creek in 2007.

events.title: Heritage Demonstrations at the SLV Museum
events.location: Grace Gallery, San Lorenzo Valley Museum, 12547 Hwy 9, Boulder Creek
events.description: Third Saturday heritage demonstration series celebrating the San Lorenzo Valley Historical Society's 50th year, running monthly April through August; the gallery is open 1 to 4 pm.

events.title: Print Transfer Workshop with Community Crafters
events.location: Boulder Creek Branch Library, Boulder Creek
events.description: Hands-on print transfer craft workshop with the Boulder Creek Community Crafters, 10 am to 1 pm.

events.title: Earth Energy Walk at Miller Property
events.location: Miller Property County Park, Kings Creek Road, Boulder Creek
events.description: Community Seed hosts an energy walk on the third Saturday of most months. Gather at 10:45 a.m., depart at 11:00 a.m., and return around 1:00 p.m., with a meditation partway.

events.title: Free Food Preservation Class: Dehydration
events.location: Felton Branch Library, Felton
events.description: A free food-preservation class on dehydration, covering electric dehydrators, oven, air, and solar drying, with dehydrated foods to sample and a take-home guidebook. Offered through the Felton Library and led by Raven Ridge Homestead. No registration required, but an RSVP through the Raven Ridge Homestead form is appreciated so they can prepare enough seating, guidebooks, and samples.

events.title: Big Bad Wolf at the SWAG Summer Concert Series
events.location: SWAG, 13026 Highway 9, Boulder Creek
events.description: Live music from Big Bad Wolf at SWAG as part of the store's summer concert series.

events.title: Rancho del Oso Nature and History Center 40th Anniversary
events.location: Rancho del Oso, Big Basin Redwoods State Park, Hwy 1 at Waddell Creek
events.description: State Parks marks 40 years of the Rancho del Oso Nature and History Center, the former home of naturalist Hulda Hoover McLean, with an evening program at 6 pm.

events.title: Midnight Blue
events.location: Joe's Bar, 13118 Highway 9, Boulder Creek

events.title: Rancho del Oso Nature and History Center 40th Anniversary
events.location: Rancho del Oso, Big Basin Redwoods State Park, Hwy 1 at Waddell Creek
events.description: Second day of the Rancho del Oso Nature and History Center 40th anniversary celebration, with an afternoon program at 3 pm.

events.title: The Mountain Road Celtic Music Radio on KBCZ 89.3 FM

events.description: Celtic and Irish music show on Boulder Creek community radio. Listen at 89.3 FM or stream from kbcz.org.

events.title: Pancake Breakfast at Highlands Park
events.location: Highlands Park Senior & Community Center, 8500 Hwy 9, Ben Lomond
events.description: Community pancake breakfast (Pancakes in the Park) hosted by the Senior Citizens Organization of the San Lorenzo Valley. Table service with eggs to order, unlimited pancakes, breakfast meats, fruit, coffee, and tea, plus a bake sale. $12 adults, $5 kids under 7; cash, credit, or debit. Everyone welcome.
